title: galium sylvestre subsp. vulgatum
intro: Galium sylvestre subsp. vulgatum, also known as the woodruff plant, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Galium sylvestre subsp. vulgatum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce anxiety and insomnia, and lower blood pressure. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusum, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
